faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a1: Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime from your account settings.
faq.a2: We accept all credit and debit cards.
faq.a3: Yes, full refund within 30 days of subscription.
